name: Explorium MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Explorium (explorium-ai org) for their AI-native data enrichment platform. Enables AI agents to enrich business data with company intelligence, contact information, firmographics, technographics, and predictive signals — supporting B2B data enrichment, lead scoring, and business intelligence workflows.
use_cases: Enriching company and contact data with Explorium's B2B intelligence from sales agents
Scoring and qualifying leads using Explorium's predictive data signals from marketing agents
Accessing firmographic and technographic data for account-based marketing agents
Building AI-driven data enrichment pipelines with Explorium's comprehensive B2B dataset
not_for: Consumer (B2C) data enrichment — Explorium focuses on B2B
Personal use data enrichment at small scale
best_when: A B2B sales or marketing team using Explorium wants AI agents to enrich CRM records, qualify leads, and access business intelligence data for account-based strategies.
avoid_when: You need consumer data enrichment or don't have an Explorium subscription. Also: data enrichment has privacy implications — ensure compliance with GDPR, CCPA.

auth.notes: Explorium API key required. Available from Explorium platform after subscription.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Explorium is a paid enterprise platform
pricing.paid_tiers: Explorium pricing based on data volume and features — contact sales
pricing.notes: Explorium is an enterprise data platform with custom pricing. Official MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Explorium API rate limits per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: B2B data enrichment involves personal business contact data — ensure GDPR/CCPA compliance
Explorium data may be subject to data residency requirements — review for regulated industries
Official from explorium-ai org — actively maintained with enterprise support
Data enrichment credits consumed per API call — monitor usage against subscription limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Business contact and company data. SOC2/GDPR/CCPA compliant. API key authentication. HTTPS. Ensure data enrichment use cases are disclosed in privacy policy.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B personal data — GDPR/CCPA compliance required. Enterprise security. Official implementation. SOC2.
